name: AI Outbound Dialer — Cold Call + Book
description: AI calls a list of prospects, delivers a pitch, handles objections, and books qualified leads into a sales rep's calendar.

client_variables.opening_script: Hi [First Name], this is [AI Name] from [Company]. I'm reaching out because...

objection_handling.not_interested: I totally understand. Just curious - what's your biggest challenge with [pain point] right now?
objection_handling.too_busy: I respect your time. Would it make sense to book a quick 15-min call when it works better?
objection_handling.already_have_solution: That's great! How's that working for you? We've helped companies like yours get even better results.
objection_handling.send_info: Absolutely, I'll send that right over. What's the best email? And would it help to have a quick walkthrough?
objection_handling.how_much: Great question. It depends on scope, but our clients typically see ROI within [timeframe]. Worth a quick chat?

client_variables.do_not_call_list: Path or tag for DNC contacts
client_variables.voicemail_script: Hi [First Name], this is [AI Name] from [Company]. I was calling about... Give us a call back at [number] or book a time at [booking_url].

setup_steps: Define target prospect list and source (Apollo/CRM)
Create AI voice agent with client's pitch and persona
Set up voicemail detection and voicemail script
Connect Calendly for real-time booking during calls
Build n8n workflow: Pull leads → Initiate calls → Process outcomes → CRM update
Configure DNC list checking before each call
Set up daily call limits and schedule
Review call recordings and refine script
Weekly review of conversion rates and script optimization
n8n_workflow_nodes: Schedule Trigger (daily at start of calling hours)
Filter - Remove DNC and recently contacted
VAPI/Bland AI - Initiate outbound call batch
Code - Parse transcript, extract qualification data
GHL - Update contact with call outcome
Slack - Notify sales rep of booked meeting
Google Sheets - Log all call outcomes
